title: Mine The World
description: This mod adds lots of OP ores to make mining GREAT again.
body:
In Minecraft Mining is not a big part of the game. 

For example, you go mining for the first time to get enough diamonds and hardly does mining again!

So, this mod changes it! 

--------------------------------------------
# Features

the mod adds new ores and combining them in the crafting table creates **OP** material!

For Example:
![Copper Ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0969d56b0ebaf488b700ef54b1d4484be69ab19e_0.webp)
Way before 1.17 this mod added Copper! If you smell the copper ore you will get copper & here it actually has its own toolset and armor!

Not only Copper! Mine The World also adds - Blood, Super Blood & Green Diamond! All of them also have their own toolset & armor.

When all the ores combine you will get a SECRET OP ore..

------------------------------------------
# Other

Please try my other old mods [Ultra Guns](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultra-guns) & [Ultra Food](https://modrinth.com/mod/ultra-food).

This is a reuload of my old mod from [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/minetheworld), and I dont have the project file therefore this mod won't get updates.
